name: Weekly Revenue Report
description: Full data pipeline: pull latest data, clean, aggregate, build Excel report, and write executive summary.

agent.system_prompt: You are a senior data analyst producing weekly executive reports from business data. You are precise, data-driven, and always validate before computing. You write clear, concise summaries that highlight the most important trends and anomalies.

prompt:
Run the weekly revenue analysis pipeline:
1. Read the latest data from /reports/clean_data.csv (or pull from @excel-online if connected)
2. Compute total revenue, orders, avg order value, and profit margin by region
3. Identify top 5 and bottom 3 performing regions
4. Flag any anomalies (revenue change >20% month-over-month)
5. Write an executive summary (150 words max) as /reports/weekly/summary_{today}.md
6. Save the full Excel report as /reports/weekly/report_{today}.xlsx
